login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a sign-in link.

sent.title: Check your email
sent.body: We sent a sign-in link to {{email}}. The link expires in 15 minutes.

error.rateLimited: Too many requests. Try again in a minute.
error.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.subtitle: Your students will appear here once you add them.
dashboard.emptyStudents: No students yet — add your first one to get started.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.warning: This permanently soft-deletes your account and all student data. Your account is recoverable for 30 days before permanent purge.

students.title: Students
students.emptyAll: No students yet. Add your first one to get started.

errors.generic: Could not add student. Try again.

detail.shareBody: Send this URL to the student. They don't need an account — the link itself is their access.
detail.notFoundBody: That student doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.

rotate.title: Rotate share link?
rotate.warning: The current share link will stop working immediately. Anyone using it will see a not-found page.

delete.title: Delete student
delete.warning: This will move the student to trash. They can be restored within 30 days. Confirm by typing the student's name:
delete.warningGeneric: This moves the student to trash. They can be restored within 30 days, after which they are permanently removed.

trash.title: Trash
trash.subtitle: Soft-deleted students. They will be permanently removed 30 days after deletion.

toast.linkCopyFailed: Could not copy link. Select and copy manually.

publicStudent.subtitle: Welcome to your practice space.
publicStudent.notFoundBody: Ask your tutor to send you a fresh link.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: That page doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect external services to streamline your workflow.

google.title: Google Calendar
google.description: Read your calendar to surface past lessons you can attach feedback to. We never write events back to Google.
google.selectHelp: Pick the calendars that contain your lesson events. Other calendars are ignored.
google.disconnectConfirmBody: Your existing lesson records stay. New events from Google won't appear on your calendar view until you reconnect.
google.noneSelected: Pick at least one lesson calendar to start syncing.
google.reconnectBanner: Google connection expired. Reconnect to restore your calendar view.

errors.quota: Google rate-limited the request. Try again in a minute.
errors.unavailable: Google is temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.
errors.saveFailed: Couldn't save your selection. Try again.
errors.callback: Google reported an error during connect. Try again.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Past lessons sit on top; future events read-only.
calendar.empty: No events in this range yet.
calendar.emptyConnectedNoCalendars: Pick a lesson calendar in settings to see events here.
calendar.emptyDisconnected: Connect Google Calendar or add a lesson manually from a student's page.
calendar.loadError: Couldn't load the calendar. Try again.
calendar.attachError: Couldn't attach the event. Try again.

errors.generic: Could not add lesson. Try again.

recent.title: Recent lessons
recent.empty: No lessons yet. Add one to start tracking feedback.

detail.notFoundBody: That lesson doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.

feedback.title: Lesson feedback
feedback.subtitle: Describe what happened in the lesson — gaps, mistakes, what to drill. The AI uses this to generate the practice game.
feedback.label: Feedback
feedback.placeholder: Sara mixed up ser/estar today. Drill physical vs emotional state.
feedback.transcribedHint: Transcribed from your voice note — review and edit before saving.

voice.title: Voice feedback
voice.subtitle: Record up to 5 minutes; we transcribe it to text you can edit.

status.done: Transcription ready — review it in the text editor below.
status.failedGeneric: We couldn't transcribe that recording. Try recording again, or type the feedback instead.
status.failedUnavailable: The transcription service is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a minute.

error.noMediaApi: Your browser doesn't support in-page recording. Type the feedback instead.
error.micDenied: Microphone access was denied. Allow it in your browser settings, or type the feedback instead.
error.tooLarge: That recording is too large. Max 25 MB.
error.quota: You've reached your monthly voice minutes cap. Try again next month, or type the feedback.
error.rejected: That audio file was rejected. Try a different recording.
error.uploadFailed: Couldn't upload the recording. Try again.

games.title: Practice games
games.needFeedback: Save feedback first — the AI generates from what you wrote.
games.saveFirst: You have unsaved feedback edits — save them before generating.
games.empty: No games yet. Click a generate button to create one.

toast.noFeedback: Save feedback first — there's nothing to generate from.

quotaBanner.title: Monthly generation cap reached
quotaBanner.body: You've used {{used}} of {{cap}} game generations this month. Your cap resets on {{date}}.

review.subtitleFillBlank: Edit each question, or regenerate any you don't like. Assign when ready.
review.subtitleTimedQuiz: Edit the prompt, answer, and distractors. Assign when ready.
review.subtitleGeneric: Review and edit the generated questions, then assign to your student.
review.generatingHint: This typically takes a few seconds.
review.failedGeneric: We couldn't generate this pool. Try again, or rephrase your feedback to be more specific.
review.failedBreaker: The AI service is temporarily unavailable. Wait a minute and try again.
review.alternatesHint: Other accepted answers — one per line.

studentPicker.title: Which student is this lesson for?
studentPicker.emptyAll: No students yet — add one from the students page first.
